atomic_units.action: Send the offer letter to the selected candidate within two business days of verbal offer confirmation
Track the candidate's response to the offer letter
Determine whether the candidate accepts or declines the offer
Notify the Hiring Manager and close the position
atomic_units.condition: If the candidate declines the offer

atomic_units.action: Initiate the Background Verification (BGV) process by submitting the candidate's details to the external BGV agency
atomic_units.condition: If the candidate accepts the offer

atomic_units.action: Share the pre‑joining document checklist with the candidate via email
Review the documents submitted by the candidate through the HR portal
Send a document deficiency notice to the candidate and request resubmission within two business days
atomic_units.condition: If any document is missing or invalid

atomic_units.action: Escalate to the HR Manager for a decision on whether to defer or cancel the joining
atomic_units.condition: If documents remain incomplete after two business days
